section.heading: Exclusive rights in mask works
section.chapeau: The owner of a mask work provided protection under this chapter has the exclusive rights to do and to authorize any of the following:

paragraph.content: to reproduce the mask work by optical, electronic, or any other means;
to import or distribute a semiconductor chip product in which the mask work is embodied; and
to induce or knowingly to cause another person to do any of the acts described in paragraphs (1) and (2).

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 98–620, title III, § 302, Nov. 8, 1984, 98 Stat. 3350.)
